2026-04-08T15:49:50.9299237Z   └ 1 line read
2026-04-08T15:49:50.9321760Z 
2026-04-08T15:49:58.6152997Z Analyzing both files for security threats.
2026-04-08T15:49:58.6153404Z 
2026-04-08T15:49:59.9117489Z The workflow is a legitimate documentation gap detector that analyzes pushes to main and files GitHub issues. The agent output contains:
